title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at VRL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at VRL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VRL Logistics. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About VRL Logistics:
VRL Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VRL Logistics!
